evals.prompt: Validate the ct-skill-creator skill against the v2 standard and show me a full report
evals.expected_output: A complete tier-by-tier validation report showing pass/fail/warn status for ct-skill-creator, with an HTML report opened in the browser
expectations: The output shows results for all 5 tiers
Claude runs generate_validation_report.py to produce an HTML report
Claude tells the user the report path or opens it in the browser
The report correctly identifies PASS or FAIL based on actual skill contents

evals.prompt: Check if this skill folder is v2 compliant: packages/skills/skills/ct-orchestrator
evals.expected_output: Validation results for ct-orchestrator with tier breakdown, and an HTML report
expectations: Claude validates ct-orchestrator not some other skill
An HTML report is generated and presented to the user

evals.prompt: Audit the ct-skill-validator skill itself — run all checks and give me a full findings report
evals.expected_output: Full self-audit of ct-skill-validator including validate gauntlet and audit_body, with HTML report
expectations: Claude runs audit_body.py for the deep body quality audit
An HTML report combining all findings is generated
Claude opens or links the HTML report for the user
The result correctly reflects ct-skill-validator's actual compliance status

evals.prompt: Run the manifest alignment check for ct-skill-validator against the CLEO manifest
evals.expected_output: Manifest alignment results showing whether ct-skill-validator is registered correctly in manifest.json and dispatch-config.json
expectations: Claude passes --manifest to validate.py or check_manifest.py
The manifest.json path is correctly resolved
The output shows Tier 4 CLEO Integration results
Claude reports whether the skill is found in manifest.json
